system.description:
This spell invokes a 20 by 20 by 20 foot cloud of billowing, nauseous gas that is impenetrable to sight or special visions. Anyone caught within it must make a successful constitution save every round while within the cloud or become nauseated and helpless for 1d4+1 rounds. Helpless characters can only move out of the cloud in a random direction. A moderate wind (11+ mph) disperses the cloud in four rounds; a strong wind (21+ mph) disperses the cloud in 1 round.

The material component for this spell is a bit of rotting food, baby poo or other foul smelling item.
